blended.narrative: Timberline Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 52°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 37°F.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
